data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements measures to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging Google’s Shielded VMs and Cloud Armor.

data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Secures user data through encryption in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data transmission and AES-256 for storage encryption.

data.title: Account Security
data.description: Protects user accounts through multi-factor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Integrates Google's Identity Platform for 2FA and secure login protocols.

data.title: Phishing Detection
data.description: Detects and prevents phishing attempts against users.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms analyze threats in real-time.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Regular scans to identify potential security weaknesses.
data.technical_spec: Automated vulnerability assessment tools run scans on all web components.
